captureMethod: Electron DevTools Protocol Page.captureScreenshot against the rebuilt application, using the real renderer and isolated temporary HOME/XDG_CONFIG_HOME directories. The hero state used a local mock Ollama response and a renderer-only synthetic status string to reproduce the requested screen without a real account or user data.

privacy.heroFixture: An inert synthetic ChatGPT cookie caused the isolated renderer to show the saved-session state; local mock Ollama metadata exposed gemma3:4b-it-qat as loaded with 1.4 GB VRAM; the renderer-only status detail was set to Translation copied immediately before capture.
privacy.fixtureCredential: A deliberately invalid synthetic OpenAI API key was stored only in the temporary profile. The provider capture contains an empty password field and a saved-key notice, never the fixture value.

files.state: ChatGPT Web selected and connected; gemma3:4b-it-qat loaded at 1.4 GB VRAM; recording idle/ready; Translation copied status; English target language.
files.approvedUse: Complete hero application window; no crop; preserve provider, model-memory, status, and language rows.

files.state: OpenAI API settings dialog with saved-key notice, whisper-1, automatic language, prompt, and temperature controls. Password input is empty and masked.
files.approvedUse: Reference-only factual verification for OpenAI API settings. Do not copy to or render in the public landing-page build.

files.state: Shortcuts & actions settings with record, stop, cancel, translate, prettify, and resend-transcription shortcuts visible.
files.approvedUse: Reference-only factual verification for shortcut availability, including Ctrl+F8. Do not copy to or render in the public landing-page build.

files.state: Prettify settings with Ollama, localhost base URL, no selected model, temperature 0, advanced generation summary, and the default conservative editing prompt.
files.approvedUse: Reference-only factual verification for Prettify provider, URL, model, temperature, and prompt context. Do not copy to or render in the public landing-page build.

files.state: Transcription history with four synthetic entries and ChatGPT Web/OpenAI API provider badges.
files.approvedUse: Reference-only factual verification for history behavior and provider badges. Do not copy to or render in the public landing-page build.

syntheticHistory.text: Turn scattered thoughts into clean text without leaving your editor.
If a request fails, retry the same recording without speaking again.
Translate selected text and copy the result back to your clipboard.
Prettify a rough draft locally with Ollama or vLLM.
